title: FPS badge overlay is visible on the stream
description: Verifies the FPS badge overlay appears on top of the live stream.

steps.description: Verify element "live stream video" is visible
Verify text "SIGNAL LOST" is not visible

title: Detection zone overlay is drawn on the stream
description: Verifies the detection zone overlay is visible on the stream when the dashboard loads.

steps.description: Verify element "live stream video" is visible
Verify element "detection zone overlay" is visible
Verify text "SIGNAL LOST" is not visible

title: FPS overlay remains visible after waiting on the page
description: Verifies the FPS badge does not disappear after the page has been open briefly.

steps.description: Verify element "live stream video" is visible

title: Floating vehicle count widget is visible on the main dashboard
description: Verifies the floating vehicle count widget renders on the main dashboard and shows an initial count label/value.

steps.description: Verify element "floating vehicle count widget" is visible
Verify element "vehicle count value" is visible

title: Vehicle count value updates over time (realtime WebSocket feed)
description: Verifies the vehicle count changes over time, indicating realtime updates are being received.

steps.description: Verify element "vehicle count value" is visible
Verify element "vehicle count value" is visible
Verify element "vehicle count value" is visible

title: Mobile-style expand: tapping the widget expands to show additional details/controls
description: Verifies the widget can be expanded via tap/click and reveals its expanded content.

steps.description: Verify element "floating vehicle count widget" is visible
Verify element "expanded vehicle count panel" is visible
Verify element "vehicle count value" is visible

title: Mobile-style collapse: tapping the widget again collapses the expanded panel
description: Verifies the expanded widget can be collapsed back to its compact state.

steps.description: Verify element "expanded vehicle count panel" is visible
Verify element "expanded vehicle count panel" is not visible

title: Guess mode progress display appears when entering guess mode
description: Verifies the widget shows a progress-style display (X/Y vehicles) when the page is in guess mode.

steps.description: Verify element "floating vehicle count widget" is visible
Click on "Guess" or "Start Guess" control on the dashboard
Verify element "guess mode progress bar" is visible

title: Guess mode progress increments while the round is active
description: Verifies that the guess-mode progress display updates over time during an active round.

steps.description: Click on "Guess" or "Start Guess" control on the dashboard
Verify element "guess mode progress bar" is visible
Verify element "guess mode progress bar" is visible
Verify element "progress count text (X/Y)" is visible

title: Widget remains present and readable after interacting with other dashboard panels
description: Verifies the floating widget stays visible and continues to present the count while opening/closing other UI areas (non-stream dependent).

steps.description: Verify element "floating vehicle count widget" is visible
Click on "Leaderboard" panel/tab on the dashboard
Verify element "floating vehicle count widget" is visible
Click on "Chat" panel/tab on the dashboard
Verify element "floating vehicle count widget" is visible

title: Place a valid guess during an active round and see an active receipt
description: Verifies a logged-in user can submit a numeric vehicle-count guess during an active round and immediately sees an active guess receipt.

steps.description: Type "25" into the vehicle count guess input field

title: Scorecard appears after round resolves for a submitted guess
description: Verifies that after placing a guess, the UI shows a scoring card (EXACT/CLOSE/MISS) once the round resolves.

steps.description: Type "12" into the vehicle count guess input field
Wait for text "EXACT" to be visible

title: Non-numeric guess input shows validation error and blocks submission
description: Verifies entering a non-numeric value results in a visible validation error and does not create an active guess receipt.

steps.description: Type "abc" into the vehicle count guess input field
Verify text "Please enter a valid number" is visible

title: Empty guess input shows validation error on submit
description: Verifies submitting with an empty guess input shows a visible validation message and prevents creating a receipt.

steps.description: Verify text "Guess is required" is visible

title: Decimal guess input is rejected with validation error
description: Verifies that a decimal vehicle-count guess is treated as invalid and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Type "12.5" into the vehicle count guess input field
Verify text "Please enter a whole number" is visible

title: Negative guess input is rejected with validation error
description: Verifies that a negative number guess shows a visible validation error and does not submit.

steps.description: Type "-1" into the vehicle count guess input field
Verify text "Must be 0 or greater" is visible

title: Leading/trailing spaces in guess are accepted and submission succeeds
description: Verifies that a numeric guess with surrounding whitespace is handled gracefully and results in an active receipt.

steps.description: Type "  30  " into the vehicle count guess input field

title: Submit guess button remains disabled or shows error when no active round is present
description: Verifies the UI prevents submitting a guess when there is no active round visible in the guess panel.

steps.description: Wait for text "No active round" to be visible
Verify text "No active round" is visible
Type "10" into the vehicle count guess input field
Verify text "Round is not active" is visible

title: Open Leaderboard and view default ranked list
description: Verifies the leaderboard panel opens from the main dashboard and shows a ranked list with user names and points.

steps.description: Click on the "Leaderboard" tab to open

title: Switch to 3MIN leaderboard tab and see updated list
description: Verifies switching the time-window tab to 3MIN updates the visible leaderboard state.

steps.description: Click on the "Leaderboard" tab to open

title: Switch across 1MIN, 3MIN, and 5MIN tabs
description: Verifies all leaderboard time-window tabs are selectable and each shows a ranked list.

steps.description: Click on the "Leaderboard" tab to open

title: Manual refresh reloads scores on 3MIN tab
description: Verifies the refresh button reloads leaderboard scores while staying on the selected time-window tab.

steps.description: Click on the "Leaderboard" tab to open

title: Leaderboard shows users with points in the ranked list
description: Verifies the ranked list presents user rows containing a user identifier and a points value.

steps.description: Click on the "Leaderboard" tab to open

title: Leaderboard lazy-load: list appears after opening tab
description: Verifies the leaderboard content is not required until the tab is opened and loads upon opening.

steps.description: Verify element "Leaderboard panel" is not visible
Click on the "Leaderboard" tab to open

title: Send a chat message with Enter and see it appear in chat panel
description: Verifies a user can post a message via Enter and it appears in the chat list in real time.

steps.description: Type "Hello chat - Enter send" into the chat input
Verify text "Hello chat - Enter send" is visible

title: Send a chat message with the Send button and see it appear
description: Verifies a user can post a message via the Send button and it appears in the chat list.

steps.description: Type "Hello chat - button send" into the chat input
Verify text "Hello chat - button send" is visible

title: Posting a message creates an activity feed overlay entry
description: Verifies that after sending a message, an activity feed item appears over the stream area.

steps.description: Type "Overlay check message" into the chat input
Verify text "Overlay check message" is visible

title: Empty message is not sent
description: Verifies that attempting to send an empty message does not create a new visible message in chat.

title: Whitespace-only message is not sent
description: Verifies that a whitespace-only message does not appear as a new message in the chat list.

title: Message persists in the chat panel after a page refresh
description: Verifies that after sending a message, refreshing the page still shows the message in the chat history (if history is loaded).

steps.description: Type "Refresh persistence message" into the chat input
Verify text "Refresh persistence message" is visible
Verify text "Refresh persistence message" is visible

title: Register a new account from the auth modal and see avatar + balance in the nav
description: Verifies a user can register successfully and the UI updates to show the logged-in state (avatar and balance).

steps.description: Click on the LOGIN button in the navigation bar
Click on the Register tab in the auth modal
Verify element "avatar" is visible in the navigation bar
Verify text "Balance" is visible in the navigation bar

title: Show an error message for invalid login credentials
description: Verifies the login form rejects invalid credentials and shows a visible error message.

steps.description: Click on the LOGIN button in the navigation bar

title: Login with valid credentials and see avatar + balance in the nav
description: Verifies a registered user can log in successfully and the UI shows the authenticated state.

steps.description: Click on the LOGIN button in the navigation bar
Verify element "avatar" is visible in the navigation bar
Verify text "Balance" is visible in the navigation bar

title: Register with mismatched passwords and verify inline validation error is shown
description: Verifies the registration form blocks submission when password confirmation does not match and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on the LOGIN button in the navigation bar
Click on the Register tab in the auth modal
Type "DifferentPass123!" into the confirm password field

title: Attempt login with empty required fields and verify required-field messaging
description: Verifies the login form enforces required fields and shows a visible error/required indicator when submitting without inputs.

steps.description: Click on the LOGIN button in the navigation bar

title: Zone polygon overlay is visible on the main dashboard
description: Verifies the detection zone polygon is drawn over the stream overlay on the main dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "Zone overlay canvas" is visible
Verify element "Detection zone polygon" is visible

title: Detection boxes render on top of the stream when live detections are present
description: Verifies that at least one detection box can appear on the overlay during live detections.

steps.description: Verify element "Detection overlay canvas" is visible
Wait for element "Detection box" to be visible

title: Overlay canvases remain visible after stream load state changes
description: Verifies the zone and detection overlays remain present even as the stream area transitions through loading/ready states.

steps.description: Verify element "Zone overlay canvas" is visible
Verify element "Detection overlay canvas" is visible
Wait for element "Stream is playing" to be visible
Verify element "Zone overlay canvas" is visible
Verify element "Detection overlay canvas" is visible

title: Camera switch attempts to load a new zone overlay
description: Verifies that switching cameras triggers a visible change in the overlay area (zone redraw attempt for the new camera).

steps.description: Verify element "Detection zone polygon" is visible
Verify element "Zone overlay canvas" is visible

title: If zone fails to load after camera switch, show empty overlay and reload affordance
description: Verifies the UI provides an empty overlay area and a reload affordance when the zone does not load for a newly selected camera.

steps.description: Select "Camera with missing zone" from dropdown
Wait for element "Zone failed to load" to be visible
Verify element "Empty overlay area" is visible

title: Reload affordance re-attempts loading the zone overlay after failure
description: Verifies the reload control is actionable and attempts to restore the polygon overlay after a zone-load failure.

steps.description: Select "Camera with missing zone" from dropdown
Verify element "Detection zone polygon" is visible

title: Open Gov Analytics overlay and see charts rendered
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Gov Analytics overlay and see Chart.js charts in the Analytics tab.

title: Switch to Live Data tab and see live data section visible
description: Verifies an authenticated user can navigate to the Live Data tab within the Gov Analytics overlay and see live data UI.

title: Browse Agencies tab and see agencies content rendered
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Agencies tab in the overlay and see agency-related UI content.

title: Close Gov Analytics overlay from the overlay UI
description: Verifies an authenticated user can close the Gov Analytics overlay and return to the main dashboard view.

title: Lazy-load recovery: charts blank on first open, then render after reopen
description: Verifies the known Chart.js first-open issue can be recovered by closing and reopening the overlay, resulting in charts being visible.

title: Account Page shows bet/guess history list section header
description: Verifies the Account page contains a clearly labeled bet/guess history section for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click the "Account" link or menu item

title: Account Page shows profile/account details section
description: Verifies the Account page displays a profile or account information area after login.

steps.description: Click the "Account" link or menu item

title: Admin can log in and view system health panel
description: Verifies an admin user can access /admin.html and see system health statuses on the page.

title: Admin sees bet round management controls
description: Verifies the admin dashboard exposes controls/sections for creating and managing bet rounds.

title: Admin can create a new bet round (happy path)
description: Verifies an admin can create a bet round from the admin dashboard and sees a visible success state.

title: Admin can manage an existing round (stop/end/resolve control visible)
description: Verifies round management actions are visible for an existing round on the admin dashboard.

title: Admin can view and access camera stream configuration section
description: Verifies camera stream configuration controls/section are visible to admin users.

title: Admin can open detection zone configuration section
description: Verifies detection zone configuration is present and accessible on the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Click the "Zones" tab or section link

title: Admin can trigger an ML training job from the dashboard
description: Verifies the admin can initiate an ML training job and receives visible confirmation.

title: Admin can access banner and promotion management section
description: Verifies banner/promotions management controls are visible to admin users.

steps.description: Click the "Banners" tab or section link

title: Non-admin user is denied admin access (access denied message)
description: Verifies a non-admin user cannot see admin controls and instead sees an access denied message.

steps.description: Verify text "You do not have permission" is visible
